property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Git\bin;C:\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\Scripts\;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;c:\Users\USER\.vscode\extensions\ms-python.debugpy-2025.18.0-win32-x64\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: contextLoads

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\USER\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
